positive: A highly intricate, symmetrical cosmic mandala combining glowing botanical elements with stylized celestial geometry. The centerpiece features bioluminescent orchid structures intertwining with crescent moons and stylized nebulae. Composition must be perfectly circular and centered, suitable for a chest print on apparel. Use a rich, saturated color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, royal violet, and electric gold accents. The style should mimic a detailed, high-contrast, neo-art deco stained-glass illustration mixed with elegant psychedelic line art. Focus on clean silhouettes, smooth gradients, sharp edges, and a central focal point that draws the eye. No realism; highly stylized and abstract in nature. Artwork must appear scalable and designed for screen printing.
negative: blurry, grain, artifact, noise, text, watermark, low resolution, extra limbs, malformed, bad anatomy, messy composition, asymmetrical, photographic, logo, trademark, cartoon, simple, sketch, oil painting, realism
